notes: Blended from recent live/near-live D02 and adjacent city-fringe comparables [99.co, EdgeProp SG, StackProperty]: premium Pinnacle@Duxton 5-room sales are around S$1.58M–S$1.63M, while nearby 5-room units at 95 Havelock Road are around S$0.995M–S$1.18M and Tanjong Pagar Plaza’s latest 5-room comp is S$928k. Because the exact block/floor/lease of the subject unit is not stated, I assumed a typical mature-estate 5-room in Tanjong Pagar/Anson sized at 1,216 sqft and priced it near the middle of the observed city-fringe range. If this is actually a Pinnacle@Duxton-style premium stack, the value would be materially higher (roughly S$1.5M+). URA’s caveat portal is for private residential transactions, so HDB comps here were taken from HDB-linked portal tables and live listings on SRX/EdgeProp/StackProperty.

comparables.title: Pinnacle@Duxton 5-room transaction at 1B Cantonment Road — S$1.63M
Blk 3 Tanjong Pagar Plaza 5-room transaction (Aug 2023) — S$928k
